original_statement: how many championships ernie els won?
mutated_statement: how many things a person did?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Object generalization + Verb generalization + Specificity reduction: "ernie els" → "a person" | "championships" → "things" | "won" → "did" | Specific athlete-title count broadened to a vague count of unspecified actions (how many championships ernie els won? → how many things a person did?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的描述：Agent将变异问题解释为“asking how many wins each person (golfer) has”并返回了具体答案“18|3|2|2|2|2|2”。在日志中（simple_query和judge_thought）未出现任何关于问题模糊、不确定或需要澄清的表述，也未提出反问或请求更多信息。Agent直接把“things”映射为表格的“wins”列并给出逐行计数，表现为在没有识别或提示歧义的情况下按自身默认理解执行任务。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
